_comment: 14:00 UTC = 09:00 EST = 06:00 PST. Daily. Hermes wake-check runs first; if no open PRs, LLM call skipped (saves $0.10). maxConcurrent=1 prevents overlap if a slow run wedges past the next tick. systemd unit Environment=TZ=UTC (Plan 01a) locks tick interpretation regardless of VPS host timezone.
